name: Chaos Reference Pack
author: vineyard-run
description: A bundle of 6 graph-manipulation plugins for demo/validation: Korean Roulette, Russian Roulette, Thanos Snap, Black Hole, Dumb AI Optimizer, Schrödinger's Node. Installing once adds all 6 together.

plugins.name: Korean Roulette
plugins.description: Randomly keeps just one node and deletes every other node and edge in the graph.

plugins.name: Russian Roulette
plugins.description: Deletes one random node and its connected edges. Everything else is kept.

plugins.name: Thanos Snap
plugins.description: Randomly deletes about half (floor(n/2)) of the nodes. Surviving nodes keep their relationships.

plugins.name: Black Hole
plugins.description: Deletes all directly connected (1-hop) neighbors of the selected base node. The base node is kept.

plugins.name: Dumb AI Optimizer
plugins.description: Shows an “AI is optimizing the graph…” progress bar, then claims “Optimization complete” — but actually changes nothing.

plugins.name: Schrödinger's Node
plugins.description: Picks one random node and deletes it with 50% probability, or does nothing with 50% probability.

name: Endpoint
author: vineyard-run
description: Host and endpoint forensic artifacts (files, processes, registry keys, services, mutexes, scheduled tasks) for DFIR and malware-behavior mapping.

types.name: file
types.label: File
types.description: A file artifact observed on a host, with hashes and path.

types.name: process
types.label: Process
types.description: A running process observed on a host.

types.name: registry_key
types.label: Registry Key
types.description: A Windows registry key or value.

types.name: service
types.label: Service
types.description: A Windows service or system daemon.

types.name: mutex
types.label: Mutex
types.description: A named synchronization object, commonly used by malware as an infection marker.

types.name: persistence
types.label: Persistence
types.description: A persistence mechanism — a scheduled task, autostart Run key, startup-folder entry, WMI subscription, or similar.

name: Financial
author: vineyard-run
description: Follow-the-money entities: cryptocurrency addresses and transactions, exchanges, and bank accounts. Public identifiers only — no keys, PANs, or credentials.

types.name: crypto_address
types.label: Crypto Address
types.description: A public cryptocurrency wallet address.

types.name: crypto_transaction
types.label: Crypto Transaction
types.description: A single on-chain cryptocurrency transaction.

types.name: exchange
types.label: Exchange
types.description: A cryptocurrency exchange or virtual-asset service provider.

types.name: bank_account
types.label: Bank Account
types.description: A traditional bank account identified by its public account identifier (IBAN / account number).

name: Geospatial
author: vineyard-run
description: Places and physical context — locations with coordinates, postal addresses, and facilities — to anchor the 'where' of an investigation.

types.name: location
types.label: Location
types.description: A named geographic location with optional coordinates.

types.name: address
types.label: Address
types.description: A postal / street address.

types.name: facility
types.label: Facility
types.description: A physical site such as an office, datacenter, or residence.

name: Identity
author: vineyard-run
description: People, organizations, and the online identities linking them — personas, email addresses, phone numbers, and social accounts — for OSINT persona and attribution work.

types.name: person
types.label: Person
types.description: A natural person or persona under investigation.

types.name: organization
types.label: Organization
types.description: A company, agency, group, or other organization.

types.name: email_address
types.label: Email Address
types.description: An email address tied to a person or organization.

types.name: phone_number
types.label: Phone Number
types.description: A telephone number in E.164 or local form.

types.name: user_account
types.label: User Account
types.description: An online or social-media account / handle.

name: Infrastructure
author: vineyard-run
description: Network-infrastructure OSINT entities (IP addresses, domains, URLs, hosts, autonomous systems, netblocks, DNS and WHOIS records, TLS certificates) and the relationships between them.

types.name: ip_address
types.label: Ip Address
types.description: An IPv4 or IPv6 network address with geolocation and ASN context.

types.name: domain
types.label: Domain
types.description: A registered DNS domain name and its registration data.

types.name: url
types.label: Url
types.description: A resource locator pointing at a host or file.

types.name: host
types.label: Host
types.description: A network host / server identified by hostname, with OS and service context.

types.name: autonomous_system
types.label: Autonomous System
types.description: A BGP autonomous system (ASN) and its operator.

types.name: netblock
types.label: Netblock
types.description: An IP address range expressed in CIDR notation.

types.name: dns_record
types.label: Dns Record
types.description: A single DNS resource record (A, MX, TXT, ...), keyed by the owner name it is published under.

types.name: whois_record
types.label: Whois Record
types.description: A WHOIS registration record, keyed by the domain or IP it describes (registrant strings are shared across many domains and make a poor identity).

types.name: certificate
types.label: Certificate
types.description: An X.509 / TLS certificate observed on a host.

name: Threat
author: vineyard-run
description: Threat-intelligence entities (malware, campaigns, vulnerabilities, threat actors, indicators, attack patterns, tools, detection signatures) and their relationships, aligned with STIX 2.1.

types.name: malware
types.label: Malware
types.description: A malware family or sample with hashes and a sighting timeline.

types.name: campaign
types.label: Campaign
types.description: A coordinated set of malicious activities over a period of time.

types.name: threat_actor
types.label: Threat Actor
types.description: An individual, group, or organization believed to operate with malicious intent.

types.name: vulnerability
types.label: Vulnerability
types.description: A CVE-tracked software vulnerability with severity and affected product.

types.name: indicator
types.label: Indicator
types.description: An indicator of compromise (IOC): an abstract, confidence-scored observable. Link it to the concrete typed node it identifies (e.g. infrastructure.ip_address, endpoint.file) with the refers_to edge.

types.name: attack_pattern
types.label: Attack Pattern
types.description: An adversary technique, mapped where possible to MITRE ATT&CK.

types.name: tool
types.label: Tool
types.description: Legitimate or offensive software used by an actor to carry out activity.

types.name: signature
types.label: Signature
types.description: A detection rule (YARA, Sigma, Snort, ...) used to identify threats.
